form.formComment: 4th (Fr1) over 1720m after showing early speed at this track was leading by 1.8 at the bell, beaten 7 m by Paddy Mach (2:07.60) in NR up to 37 on March 24 at $19. Before that 5th (Sr1) over 1770m at Canberra beaten 35 m by Pyekakariki (2:11.80) in 3yo+ NR up to 44 on March 15 at $61. Not keen.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr4) over 1730m after showing early speed at Bathurst was leading by 2.08 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Lucky Punt (2:04.50) in NR up to 47 on April 1 at $3.30. Forward performance expected from the good draw.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr6) over 2170m at Junee was 5th-8.8 at the bell, beaten 14 m by My Latin Lady (2:48.00) in NR up to 50 M on March 31 at $2.90. Two runs back 6th (Sr1) over 2100m at Charlton, at the bell was 3rd-4m on the pegs beaten 8 m by To The Nines (2:35.10) in NR 49 to 54 on September 29 at $11. Open to improvement.

Watch for a spike in form.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 5th (Fr5) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway beaten 16 m by Gem N Em (2:02.80) in NR up to 58 M on April 4 at $101. At the start before was well back in the run when 6th (Fr5) over 2100m at this track, beaten 40 m by Major Allegiance (2:33.70) in NR up to 57 on February 3 at $7.50. Do not dismiss.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fifth behind Seaside Sid at Riverina Paceway over 1740m in a NR up to 52 on March 27 at $14. Then a handy effort when a close second behind Memphis Fury at Parkes over 1660m in a NR up to 52 on April 4 at $9.50. Strong claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced at the 600m when the pace on the marker line eased.
Sulky wheel contacted by Full Of Spice leaving the 600m.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr1) over 1730m at Bathurst, at the bell was 6th-8.56 beaten 6 m by Layla Shannon (2:05.30) in NR up to 52 M on April 1 at $13. Before that, a solid effort despite getting well back, when 2nd (Fr3) over 2100m at this track was 3rd-4.6 at the bell, beaten 5 m by Hello I Tea (2:34.40) in NR up to 57 on March 24 at $6.50. Can play a major role.

form.formComment: Last start on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 2.25 m when quickly away, (Fr6) at Temora (2:30.20) beating Our Rocky in NR up to 53 on April 6 at $26 at the bell was 2nd-3.8. Tricky draw but could go on with it.
